sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Capital City Bank Group (NASDAQ:CCBG) Sees Strong Trading Volume - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Capital City Bank Group (NASDAQ:CCBG) experienced a slight decrease in trading volume but continues to show strong underlying fundamentals and positive analyst sentiment. The bank reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and maintains a "Buy" rating with an average target price of $45.00. Institutional investors have actively adjusted their positions, indicating ongoing interest in the company.

feed.title: South Korean defense ETFs surge as geopolitical tensions mount
feed.summary: South Korean defense-related ETFs have significantly outperformed other sectors, including semiconductors, this year due to escalating geopolitical tensions globally. Leveraged defense ETFs saw gains exceeding 60%, while non-leveraged ones rose around 30%. This surge is attracting overseas capital and driving up stock prices for major South Korean defense firms like Hanwha Systems, as the government aims to become a top global defense exporter.

feed.title: Wells Fargo CEO Touts Strong Hiring, Asset Flows in Wealth Division
feed.summary: Wells Fargo's CEO, Charlie Scharf, highlighted strong performance in the company's wealth division, which saw a 29% increase in net income in the fourth quarter. The growth was attributed to increased hiring, declining attrition, and accelerating net asset flows in the latter half of 2025. Despite missing overall profit estimates due to severance costs, the wealth management segment, managing $2.5 trillion in assets, demonstrated significant momentum.

feed.title: DuPont de Nemours, Inc. (NYSE:DD) Short Interest Update
feed.summary: DuPont de Nemours, Inc. (NYSE:DD) experienced a significant 41.1% drop in short interest in December, bringing the total to 8,980,282 shares. Company insiders, including SVP Erik T. Hoover and CEO Lori Koch, sold shares in November, while institutional investors modified their holdings. Analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for DD and project 4.38 earnings per share for the current year.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley see double-digit profit jumps amid surging stock market
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley both reported double-digit profit increases in the fourth quarter, driven by a strong stock market and increased deal-making activity. Goldman Sachs's net earnings rose 12% to $4.62 billion, while Morgan Stanley's profit reached $4.4 billion. Both banks also saw significant jumps in investment fee revenues and backlogs, reflecting broader positive trends in the financial industry despite some ongoing tensions between Wall Street and the White House.

feed.title: Road closure on Carlson Boulevard continues as demolition planned after Public Storage fire
feed.summary: Carlson Boulevard in Richmond remains closed due to a three-alarm fire that heavily damaged a Public Storage facility. Officials are awaiting demolition of the structurally compromised building, especially a bowing concrete wall, before the road can be reopened for public safety. The fire, which started on Christmas Eve, caused significant structural damage, and its origin remains under investigation as the building is unsafe to enter.

feed.title: Halper Sadeh LLC Encourages Cummins Inc. Shareholders to Contact the Firm to Discuss Their Rights
feed.summary: Halper Sadeh LLC, an investor rights law firm, is investigating whether certain officers and directors of Cummins Inc. (NYSE: CMI) breached their fiduciary duties to shareholders. The firm encourages long-term shareholders to contact them to discuss potential corporate governance reforms, the return of funds to the company, or other relief. Shareholder participation is highlighted as a way to improve company transparency and accountability, potentially enhancing shareholder value.

feed.title: Nebraska flour mill to be closed by ADM Milling
feed.summary: ADM Milling Co. announced that it will cease flour milling operations at its Lincoln, Nebraska complex as part of a long-term strategy to optimize its US milling footprint. Non-milling operations like packaging and extruded product production will continue, and ADM expects a seamless transition for customers, leveraging its network of mills in nearby states. The closure affects about 30 of 65 employees, with opportunities for relocation or severance packages provided.

feed.title: KKR Secures $2.5B Capital Infusion For Asia Private Credit Fund
feed.summary: KKR (NYSE: KKR) has successfully raised $2.5 billion for its Asia private credit fund, with $1.8 billion allocated to KKR Asia Credit Opportunities Fund II (ACOF II) and $700 million from separately managed accounts. This fund makes ACOF II the largest pan-regional performing private credit fund in Asia Pacific, building on the success of KKR's first such fund in 2022. The capital will be used for privately originated performing credit investments focusing on senior and unitranche direct lending, capital solutions, and collateral-backed investments across key Asian markets.

feed.title: As ações da Applied Materials disparam após o Barclays elevar a recomendação com base nas perspectivas de gastos impulsionados por IA
feed.summary: As ações da Applied Materials (NASDAQ:AMAT) subiram cerca de 8% depois que o Barclays elevou a recomendação da empresa de "Underweight" para "Overweight", citando melhores perspectivas de investimento ligadas à inteligência artificial. Embora a Applied Materials tenha tido um desempenho inferior em 2025 devido a preocupações com a exposição à China e à concorrência, o Barclays acredita que esses riscos já estão precificados e que o aumento dos gastos em fundição e DRAM torna a empresa atraente. A infraestrutura de IA, particularmente a NVIDIA, e o armazenamento de alta largura de banda são vistos como principais impulsionadores do crescimento.

feed.title: AbbVie Still Aims To Be A Major Obesity Player – With A Lift From Botox
feed.summary: AbbVie continues to position itself as a significant player in the obesity market, with a strategic boost from its Botox franchise. The article highlights AbbVie's ongoing efforts and recent deals in this therapeutic area, alongside references to other companies and developments in the competitive obesity landscape. It also mentions key financial events and partnerships relevant to AbbVie's strategy.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Group expands loyalty across Royal Caribbean, Celebrity, Silversea cruises
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has launched Points Choice, a new loyalty feature allowing travelers to apply points earned from any of its brands (Royal Caribbean, Celebrity Cruises, or Silversea) to the loyalty program of their choice. This move provides greater flexibility for cruisers, building on the company's existing Status Match program and aiming to retain loyal customers by offering more adaptable rewards. The program applies to sailings departing on or after January 30, 2026.

feed.title: AI Is Rewriting Global Power Needs, Creating a Massive Opportunity for This Engineering and Construction Company
feed.summary: The rise of AI is dramatically increasing global power demand, particularly for energy-intensive data centers. Fluor Corporation, a leading engineering and construction company with over a century of experience, is well-positioned to capitalize on this trend by building complex AI data centers, semiconductor plants, and mining infrastructure for critical raw materials. With a substantial backlog of $28.2 billion and a focus on large-scale projects, Fluor is poised for significant growth as the demand for AI-related infrastructure continues to surge.

feed.title: GE Aerospace taps Mohamed Ali to lead expanded commercial engines unit (GE:NYSE)
feed.summary: GE Aerospace has appointed Mohamed Ali, an experienced executive, to head its expanded commercial engines and services division. This new role integrates the company's technology and operations teams, following the impending retirement of another executive. The move aims to streamline leadership and operations within this critical segment of GE Aerospace.

feed.title: The Truth About W.W. Grainger Inc: Boring Name, Wildly Powerful Stock?
feed.summary: The article discusses W.W. Grainger Inc. (GWW), an industrial supplies company, highlighting its strong financial performance and consistent growth despite its "boring" image. It argues that while unappealing to those seeking flashy, viral stocks, Grainger offers a solid, long-term investment opportunity characterized by dividends, consistent earnings, and a crucial role in the economy. The piece advises investors to consider GWW for portfolio stability rather than viral hype.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Group Rolls Out New Points Choice Loyalty Program
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has introduced "Points Choice," a new loyalty program allowing guests to earn and apply points across its three brands: Royal Caribbean, Celebrity Cruises, and Silversea. This program, launching in January 2026, aims to provide more flexibility and enhance the loyalty experience by enabling members to build status in their preferred program or accelerate status in others. It builds upon the existing Status Match program, creating a more integrated and rewarding ecosystem for loyal guests.

feed.title: Duke Energy Executive Preston Gillespie to Retire, Transition Plan Announced
feed.summary: Duke Energy's Executive Vice President and Chief Generation Officer Preston Gillespie announced his retirement effective March 1, 2027, after 40 years of service, with a transition plan to guide new nuclear projects until March 2026. Under Gillespie's leadership, Duke Energy has maintained over 50,000 megawatts of generating capacity and is pursuing an ambitious energy transition strategy. Wall Street analysts forecast a moderate buy for DUK stock, with an average 1-year price target of $138.13.

feed.title: Chevron board member made sizable donation to Trump-affiliated PAC
feed.summary: A Chevron board member, John Hess, and his wife, Susan Hess, each contributed $1 million to MAGA Inc., a PAC aligned with former President Donald Trump, in December 2025. This significant donation occurred shortly before the U.S. took military action in Venezuela, where Chevron is the only U.S. oil company operating. Critics raise concerns about potential conflicts of interest, as the Trump administration is encouraging investment in Venezuelan oil, which could benefit Chevron.

feed.title: Barclays maintains overweight rating on Energy Transfer LP (ET)
feed.summary: This article states that Barclays has reiterated its overweight rating on Energy Transfer LP (ET). No further details about the reasons for this rating or financial specifics are provided in the content.

feed.title: Tesla agrees to mediation to settle racial harassment lawsuit
feed.summary: Tesla has agreed to private mediation to resolve a 2023 lawsuit filed by the U.S. Equal Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC) alleging widespread racial harassment at its Fremont, California manufacturing plant. The lawsuit claims Tesla tolerated racial slurs, stereotyping, and hostile graffiti, and retaliated against employees who opposed the harassment. Mediation talks are expected to occur in March or April.

feed.title: Here is What Analysts Think About AT&T Inc. (T)
feed.summary: AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) recently saw varied analyst ratings in January 2026, with Bernstein reiterating a Buy, Scotiabank lowering its price target to $29.50, and KeyBanc and Arete both downgrading the stock to Sell with a $20 price target. This comes as AT&T partners with American Airlines to launch free in-flight Wi-Fi, starting in January and rolling out gradually. The company provides telecom services through its Communications and Latin America segments.

feed.title: Home Bancshares Inc (NYSE:HOMB) Posts Strong Sales
feed.summary: Home Bancshares Inc (NYSE:HOMB) reported strong fourth-quarter earnings, meeting expectations despite higher-than-anticipated revenue. The company achieved record annual income of $475.4 million, driven by significant loan growth of $400.2 million and an improved net interest margin of 4.61%. HOMB's stock rose 2.83% following the announcement, which also highlighted strong cost management, maintained credit quality, and a 5% dividend increase.

feed.title: World Economic Forum and Salesforce Empower Global Leaders With First-of-its-Kind Agentic Assistant for the 2026 Annual Meeting in Davos
feed.summary: Salesforce has partnered with the World Economic Forum to launch "EVA," an agentic AI assistant powered by Agentforce 360, for the 2026 Annual Meeting in Davos. This innovative concierge app will help over 3,000 global leaders personalize schedules, navigate the campus, and prepare for bilaterals by leveraging the Forum's institutional knowledge. EVA aims to transform the attendee experience by providing instant, actionable intelligence and reducing manual tasks, embodying the concept of an "Agentic Enterprise."

feed.title: Cash offers target up to $450M of Viatris 2026 and 2025 notes
feed.summary: Viatris and its subsidiaries have launched cash tender offers for certain outstanding senior notes. These offers include "Any and All Tender Offers" for 2025 notes from Viatris and Mylan, and a "Maximum Tender Offer" for up to $450 million of Utah Acquisition 2026 notes, with an early tender payment of $30 per $1,000. Key deadlines for these offers range from September 10 to October 2, 2024, with settlement dates expected between September and October 2024.

feed.title: Self Storage Could Be Limited, Analyst Recommends This Buying Stock
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs analyst Caitlin Burrows maintained a Buy rating on Public Storage (NYSE: PSA) but lowered the price target from $332 to $321. The analyst noted limited demand catalysts for self-storage in 2026, predicting a year similar to 2025 where portfolio footprint and market performance will heavily influence earnings. Public Storage is shown to be outperforming rival Extra Space Storage Inc (NYSE: EXR) in similar markets.

feed.title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Qualcomm Technologies, Advanced Micro Devices, Intel and NVIDIA
feed.summary: This Zacks Analyst Blog compares Qualcomm (QCOM) and Advanced Micro Devices (AMD), two major semiconductor firms, focusing on their competitive strengths, weaknesses, and outlook in the AI and chip markets. While both companies are advancing their portfolios for AI, the analysis delves into their market positioning, financial estimates, and valuation to determine which might be a smarter investment in 2026, ultimately suggesting Qualcomm has a slight edge due to its valuation and VGM Score.

feed.title: Franklin Resources stock hits 52-week high at 26.08 USD
feed.summary: Franklin Resources (BEN) stock recently reached a 52-week high of $26.08, showcasing a 38.34% increase in the past year. The company boasts a market capitalization of $13.57 billion, a 5.15% dividend yield, and a 45-year history of consistent dividend payments, indicating financial stability and investor confidence. Recent positive developments include AUM exceeding forecasts and the U.S. Department of Justice resolving its investigation into a subsidiary without criminal charges.

feed.title: Big Blue’s Renaissance: How IBM Reclaimed the Enterprise Throne in the AI Era
feed.summary: IBM has undergone a significant transformation, moving from a legacy hardware provider to a dominant leader in Enterprise AI and Hybrid Cloud sectors, with its stock trading near record highs. The company's focus on regulated industries, data governance, and strategic acquisitions like HashiCorp and Confluent has positioned it to capitalize on the "Agentic AI" trend, where AI autonomously executes complex business workflows. IBM's "Client Zero" strategy, utilizing AI for internal automation, and its focus on "Cloud Repatriation" demonstrate a lucrative path that has led to substantial growth and market outperformance.

feed.title: Graves Gilbert Clinic, Humana reach two-year agreement
feed.summary: Graves Gilbert Clinic and Humana have signed a two-year agreement to continue providing healthcare services to Humana-insured individuals, effective March 1, 2026. This collaboration aims to ensure uninterrupted patient access to care, improve coordination, enhance cost transparency, and maintain high-quality outcomes. Both organizations affirm that patients should not experience disruptions to their scheduled medical services.

feed.title: Dividend King Abbott Shows Why 52 Consecutive Increases Weren't Luck With Strong Cash Flow Coverage
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories (ABT), a Dividend King, has raised its quarterly dividend for the 52nd consecutive year to $0.63, a 6.8% increase, demonstrating strong financial health. The company's free cash flow of $6.35 billion in 2024 comfortably covered $3.84 billion in dividend payments, resulting in a healthy 60.4% payout ratio. Abbott's diversified business, reduced debt, and management's focus on shareholder returns ensure the dividend's safety and continued growth.

feed.title: enVVeno Medical Announces Reverse Stock Split
feed.summary: enVVeno Medical (NASDAQ:NVNO) announced a 1-for-35 reverse stock split, effective January 20, 2026, to regain compliance with Nasdaq listing requirements. This move, approved by stockholders, is part of a broader strategy for 2026 aimed at creating shareholder value and advancing the company's position in treating deep venous disease. The split will reduce outstanding shares and adjust equity awards and warrants accordingly.

feed.title: Calavo Growers Inc (NASDAQ:CVGW) Getting Acquired
feed.summary: Calavo Growers Inc (NASDAQ:CVGW) stock rose after the announcement of its strategic merger with Mission Produce, valued at approximately $430 million. This acquisition, which will give Calavo stockholders $27.00 per share in cash and Mission shares, aims to create a scaled North American avocado and fresh produce platform. Despite the acquisition news, Calavo reported fourth-quarter earnings below analyst expectations, citing declining avocado prices and volumes.

feed.title: Interesting HII Put And Call Options For September 18th
feed.summary: New options contracts for Huntington Ingalls Industries, Inc. (HII) with a September 18th expiration date have become available. BNK Invest's YieldBoost formula identified a put contract at a $400 strike price and a call contract at a $420 strike price as particularly interesting opportunities for investors, offering potential returns for sellers of these options. The article details the mechanics and potential returns of selling these specific put and call options given the current stock price and implied volatilities.

feed.title: Applied Materials FY25 HBM Revenues Hit $1.5B: A New Growth Driver?
feed.summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) achieved $1.5 billion in HBM revenues in fiscal 2025 and aims to double this to $3 billion in the next few years, driven by its leadership in hybrid bonding technology, including its new Kinex system. Despite 2025 revenues being flat year-over-year, the company anticipates strong future growth due to increasing demand for advanced chip packaging. Applied Materials holds a strong position in the non-lithography wafer fabrication equipment market, while competitors like ASML Holding and Lam Research also play significant roles in the HBM space.

feed.title: Loan Growth & High Fee Income to Support Fifth Third's Q4 Earnings
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) is expected to report strong fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results, driven by loan growth, increasing net interest income (NII), and higher fee income. Despite anticipated rises in expenses, the bank predicts overall positive financial performance. The company has a good track record of beating earnings estimates and its stock currently holds a Zacks Rank of 3.

feed.title: This is What Analysts Think About Arista Networks (ANET)
feed.summary: Arista Networks (ANET) has received updated ratings and price targets from several analyst firms. Piper Sandler upgraded ANET to Overweight with a $159 price target, citing its position for a "Year of Refresh" with growing AI exposure and enterprise investment. Melius Research maintained a Buy rating with a $200 price target, while Morgan Stanley reaffirmed an Overweight rating but cut its price target to $159, noting a broadening AI trade for infrastructure names.

feed.title: Tecvayli tops standard drugs in early multiple myeloma, J&J says
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson's drug Tecvayli has shown superior efficacy against standard treatments in a Phase 3 trial for multiple myeloma patients who had relapsed after initial therapies. The drug significantly extended progression-free survival and reduced the risk of death by 40%, supporting its potential use earlier in the disease course. These results build on previous evidence that prompted the FDA to award J&J a "national priority" regulatory fast pass for Tecvayli.

feed.title: Why Pfizer Inc. (PFE) is One of the Best Affordable Stocks Under $30
feed.summary: Pfizer Inc. (PFE) has shown positive results from its BREAKWATER trial for metastatic colorectal cancer, with a 64% objective response rate for its BRAFTOVI regimen, significantly outperforming standard care. Despite these clinical successes, the stock faces analyst skepticism due to upcoming patent expirations, with Berenberg Bank and UBS reaffirming "Hold" and "Neutral" ratings, respectively, and setting a $25 price target. The company is actively pursuing new strategies, such as the MTSR obesity deal, to counteract potential revenue losses.

feed.title: What Does Wall Street Think About ServiceNow (NOW)?
feed.summary: Wall Street analysts have recently adjusted their price targets for ServiceNow (NOW). Stifel and Wells Fargo both cut their targets, while maintaining a "Buy" or "Overweight" rating, respectively, highlighting the potential of AI in driving future performance. ServiceNow is set to release its Q4 and full-year fiscal results on January 28.

feed.title: Duke Energy announces leadership changes in its generation and operational excellence organization
feed.summary: Duke Energy announced that Preston Gillespie, executive vice president, chief generation officer, and enterprise operational excellence, will retire after 40 years of service, effective March 1, 2027. To ensure a smooth transition, Kelvin Henderson will take over as senior vice president, chief generation officer, and enterprise operational excellence, and Steven Capps will become senior vice president and chief nuclear officer, both effective March 1, 2026. These leadership changes are part of Duke Energy's efforts to meet growing energy demands and continue its energy transition.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Raises Price Target on Dollar Tree (DLTR) to $146
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its price target for Dollar Tree (DLTR) to $146 from $130, while maintaining an "Equal-Weight" rating. This adjustment follows similar price target raises from other analysts, indicating a generally bullish sentiment for the company. Despite these increases, the average target price from 22 analysts suggests a potential downside from its current stock price, though GuruFocus estimates an upside based on its GF Value.

feed.title: Barclays Lowers Price Target for Ameren (AEE) While Maintaining Equal-Weight Rating | AEE Stock News
feed.summary: Barclays has reiterated its 'Equal-Weight' rating for Ameren (AEE) but has decreased the price target from $111.00 to $104.00, reflecting a 6.31% reduction. This adjustment indicates a cautious perspective on the stock's future performance. The article also provides a summary of recent analyst ratings and Ameren's business description, along with Wall Street and GuruFocus forecast data.

feed.title: This is What Analysts Think About Arista Networks (ANET)
feed.summary: Arista Networks (ANET) is considered a top long-term growth stock by hedge funds, with recent analyst upgrades and maintained Buy ratings, despite some price target adjustments. Piper Sandler sees 2026 as a "Year of Refresh" for ANET, citing growing hyperscaler and AI exposure, enterprise investment, and a conservative setup. The company develops cloud networking solutions and is seen as holding market share and benefiting from lagged capex trends.

feed.title: Where is Eli Lilly and Company (LLY) Headed According to Analysts?
feed.summary: Jefferies has reaffirmed a Buy rating on Eli Lilly and Company (LLY) with a $1,300.00 price target, following positive Phase 3b trial results for its Taltz and Zepbound combination in psoriatic arthritis and obesity. Additionally, Eli Lilly announced an agreement to acquire Ventyx Biosciences for approximately $1.2 billion, enhancing its portfolio of therapies for inflammatory-mediated diseases. The article notes LLY's strong position in pharmaceuticals but suggests that some AI stocks might offer greater upside potential with less risk.

feed.title: Analysts Estimate CSX (CSX) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
feed.summary: Analysts are predicting a year-over-year decline in earnings and stagnant revenues for CSX (CSX) when it reports its results for the quarter ended December 2025. While the company has beaten consensus EPS estimates in two of the last four quarters, a negative Zacks Earnings ESP suggests that a surprise beat is unlikely this time. Investors are advised to consider other factors in addition to earnings expectations for CSX stock.

feed.title: This is What The Street Thinks About Uber Technologies (UBER)
feed.summary: Uber Technologies (UBER) has received mixed but generally positive analyst ratings, with Mizuho Securities reaffirming a Buy and Jefferies and BofA also maintaining Buy ratings, while Cantor Fitzgerald slightly cut its price target but kept an Overweight rating. Analysts highlight the potential for durable mobility growth, progress in AV partnerships, and the positive impact of AI on the internet sector. The company also recently showcased its production-intent robotaxi vehicles at CES 2026, with autonomous testing already underway.

feed.title: What Do Analysts Think About KLA Corporation (KLAC)?
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald recently reiterated its "Overweight" rating for KLA Corporation (KLAC) and raised its price target to $1,750, citing high conviction due to anticipated solid secular growth in wafer fabrication equipment through 2028. The firm expects the semiconductor capital equipment sector to be in the early stages of an investment cycle, further bolstered by the burgeoning AI era. KLA Corporation is set to review its second-quarter fiscal year 2026 earnings on January 29.

feed.title: Is Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) One of the Best Long Term Growth Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds?
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ: AMD) is considered a top long-term growth stock by hedge funds, especially after introducing new Ryzen AI Embedded processors for AI-driven applications and expanding collaboration with HPE for AI infrastructure. The company's new processors integrate XDNA 2 NPU and "Zen 5" core architecture for efficient AI compute. While recognizing AMD's potential, the article suggests there might be other AI stocks with greater upside and less risk.

feed.title: Goldman Explores Prediction Market Opportunities, Solomon Says
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon revealed the firm is exploring opportunities in prediction markets, which are fast-growing forums for betting on real-world events. Solomon described these markets as "super interesting" and confirmed he has met with leaders of the two largest prediction market firms recently, signaling potential future involvement from the investment bank.

feed.title: SEC Dismisses Proceeding Against IEH Corporation
feed.summary: IEH Corporation announced that the SEC has dismissed the Division of Enforcement's proceeding seeking revocation of the registration of IEHC's securities. President and CEO Dave Offerman expressed satisfaction, noting the company has rectified past filing delinquencies and plans to uplist its stock for greater liquidity and investment opportunities. The company, known for its high-performance connectors, looks forward to future growth after this positive development.
